game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Helltaker is a short game about sharply dressed demon girls. You woke up one day with a dream. Harem full of demon girls. You've opened the portal in hopes of fulfilling your wildest desires. Hellfire burns through your lungs, death awaits around every corner and everything looks like from a cutesy mobile game. You are in hell.

Features:

  • Traverse hell in search of love.
  • Win the hearts of horrible demon girls.
  • Kick adorable skeletons around.
  • Solve puzzles as efficiently as possible.
  • Or just skip puzzles in the menu.
  • Try to not get murdered by demon girls.
  • Get murdered by demon girls anyway.
game_info.description: You've descended into Hell with one goal: assemble a harem of demon girls. Navigate through puzzle levels by pushing blocks and skeletons to reach the demon girl at the end of each stage. You have limited moves per level, so plan carefully! Solve increasingly difficult puzzles across multiple levels. Be efficient or face game over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the player (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Kick/push adjacent blocks or skeletons in the direction you're facing
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement mechanics and collision detection. Validates that the player can move in all four directions and that collision boundaries work properly with walls and obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in all four cardinal directions systematically. Test movement near walls and obstacles to ensure collision detection prevents passing through solid objects.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position updates correctly for valid moves. Player cannot move through walls or off-screen. Position history shows successful navigation without getting stuck.
TEST_1.description: Testing basic movement mechanics and collision detection. Validates that the player can move in all four directions and that collision boundaries work properly with walls and obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy: Move the player in all four cardinal directions systematically. Test movement near walls and obstacles to ensure collision detection prevents passing through solid objects.
TEST_1.expected: Player position updates correctly for valid moves. Player cannot move through walls or off-screen. Position history shows successful navigation without getting stuck.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the win condition by completing all puzzle levels efficiently. This validates that the game progresses through levels correctly and reaches the final win state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use optimal pathfinding and push mechanics to solve each level in the minimum number of moves. Push blocks and skeletons strategically to clear paths to the demon girl goal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all levels within move limits. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state after completing the final level. Score reflects efficient puzzle solving.
TEST_2.description: Testing the win condition by completing all puzzle levels efficiently. This validates that the game progresses through levels correctly and reaches the final win state.
TEST_2.strategy: Use optimal pathfinding and push mechanics to solve each level in the minimum number of moves. Push blocks and skeletons strategically to clear paths to the demon girl goal.
TEST_2.expected: Successfully complete all levels within move limits. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state after completing the final level. Score reflects efficient puzzle solving.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing the lose condition by intentionally running out of moves. Validates that move counting works correctly and triggers game over when moves reach zero.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Make inefficient moves or intentionally waste moves by moving back and forth until the move counter reaches zero without completing the level.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when moves reach zero. Move counter decrements properly with each action. Game over screen displays appropriately.

TEST_3.strategy: Make inefficient moves or intentionally waste moves by moving back and forth until the move counter reaches zero without completing the level.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing push mechanics with blocks and skeletons. Validates that objects can be pushed correctly and that chain pushing works when objects are adjacent.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Position player adjacent to pushable objects and use Space to kick them. Test pushing objects into walls (should fail) and pushing objects into empty spaces (should succeed).
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Objects move one tile in the push direction when there's space. Objects don't move when blocked by walls or other objects. Push action consumes one move.
TEST_4.description: Testing push mechanics with blocks and skeletons. Validates that objects can be pushed correctly and that chain pushing works when objects are adjacent.

TEST_4.expected: Objects move one tile in the push direction when there's space. Objects don't move when blocked by walls or other objects. Push action consumes one move.
